prompt_text:
### Demographics: 37-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 1 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after elevated fasting glucose on routine screening
Current symptoms: Postprandial fatigue and thirst noted; no DKA/HHS signs; no recent hypoglycemia

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 5 (0-15) (Dialysis: Hemodialysis)
Heart failure: HFimpEF (NYHA Class II)
Body mass index category: Obese Class II
Rheumatoid Arthritis
Frailty with Mobility Impairment
Psychotic Disorder on Atypical Antipsychotics
Chronic Obstructive Pulmonary Disease
Recurrent Complicated Urinary Tract Infections
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 5 (0-15) (Dialysis: Hemodialysis); HF: HFimpEF (NYHA Class II); ASCVD (No); MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Obese Class II
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (mother)
- Social history: Never smoker; Alcohol 1-2 drinks/month

### Medication information
- Current medications: Sitagliptin 100mg once daily; Insulin Degludec 15units once daily; Olanzapine (10 mg nightly), Methotrexate (15 mg weekly), Prednisone (5 mg daily), Fluticasone/salmeterol Inhaler (twice daily), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily), Ciprofloxacin (500 mg twice daily for 7 days)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 106.6 kg; Height 179.2 cm; BMI 33.2 kg/m²; Blood pressure 132/88 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 11.8%; 9 months ago 12.0%; 6 months ago 11.5%; 3 months ago 11.0%; current 9.8%), FPG (12 months ago 297mg/dL; 9 months ago 317mg/dL; 6 months ago 285mg/dL; 3 months ago 320mg/dL; current 245mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 109.8kg; 9 months ago 108.3kg; 6 months ago 107.2kg; 3 months ago 108.8kg; current 106.6kg), Height (12 months ago 179.2cm; 9 months ago 179.2cm; 6 months ago 179.2cm; 3 months ago 179.2cm; current 179.2cm), BMI (12 months ago 34.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 34.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 33.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 34.0kg/m²; current 33.2kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 134mmHg; 9 months ago 132mmHg; 6 months ago 133mmHg; 3 months ago 131mmHg; current 132mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 91mmHg; 9 months ago 88mmHg; 6 months ago 88mmHg; 3 months ago 91mmHg; current 88mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 34U/L; 9 months ago 33U/L; 6 months ago 28U/L; 3 months ago 36U/L; current 32U/L), AST (12 months ago 14U/L; 9 months ago 14U/L; 6 months ago 23U/L; 3 months ago 22U/L; current 19U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.9mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.9mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.0mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.0mg/dL; current 1.0mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 12mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 11mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 12mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 8.0mL/min/1.73m²; current 9mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 637mg/g; 9 months ago 967mg/g; 6 months ago 763mg/g; 3 months ago 1075mg/g; current 984mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 86mg/dL; 9 months ago 88mg/dL; 6 months ago 92mg/dL; 3 months ago 87mg/dL; current 89mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 52mg/dL; 9 months ago 51mg/dL; 6 months ago 51mg/dL; 3 months ago 51mg/dL; current 53mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 138mg/dL; 9 months ago 122mg/dL; 6 months ago 122mg/dL; 3 months ago 116mg/dL; current 127mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 13.0g/dL; 9 months ago 12.2g/dL; 6 months ago 11.4g/dL; 3 months ago 12.0g/dL; current 11.4g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide 1.31 ng/mL (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has standard insurance with moderate copays and a monthly medication budget of ≤ KRW 500,000.
